ion | +-- ptolemy.kernel.util.IllegalActionException All Implemented Interfaces: java.io.Serializable Direct Known Subclasses: GraphActionException public class IllegalActionException extends KernelException Thrown on an attempt t

ion extends KernelException Thrown on an attempt to perform an action that would result in an inconsistent or contradictory data structure if it were allowed to complete. Examples include: An attempt to remove a port from an entity when the port does

to remove a port from an entity when the port does not belong to the entity. An attempt to add an item with no name to a named list. Since: Ptolemy II 0.2 Version: $Id: IllegalActionException.java,v 1.27 2003/01/08 02:27:24 ptII Exp $ Author: Edward
